titleStmt.title: SII 22.298: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 298. (A.R. No. 298 of 1906) NORTH ARCOT DISTRICT, WALAJAPET TALUK, TIRUMĀLPURAM. MAṆIKAṆṬHĒŚVARA TEMPLE—ON THE WEST WALL OF THE FIRST PRĀKĀRA. PARĀNTAKA I—37th YEAR (A.D. 943-44)

summary.p: This is slightly damaged and is incomplete. It registers a sale of land tax-free by the temple at Tirumālpēṟu in Valla-nāḍu a division of Dāmaṟkōṭṭam, to a certain Kaḍagaṉ Kuñjaramallaṉ alias Śōḻamārāyaṉ.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . matiraikoṇṭa kopparakecarivaṉmaṟkku yāṇṭu muppat teḻāvatu tāmarkoṭṭattu vallanāṭṭu tirumālpeṟṟu Ādidāsa caṇḍeśvaraneṉ kaṭakaṉ kuñcaramallarākiya
coḻamārāyanukku Iṟaiyiliyāka viṟṟukkuṭutta bhūmi peṇṇāṟu sāratti ṉuttom payire mey pāḻāykkiṭanta nilattukku Ellai śrīkovintapāṭi Ellaikku meṟkum
ṭṭārkālukku vaṭakkum Irukūrk kālukkun tirunantavānattukku kiḻakkum ṟkum Innāṉkellaiyilum Akappaṭṭa bhūmi Uṇṇila moḻiviṉṟi viṟṟukkuṭutteṉ Emmilicainta vilai
pporuḷaṟakkoṇṭu Iṟaiyiliyāka viṟṟukkuṭutteṉ Ituve poruḷaṟutip poruṭ celavāka viṟṟukkuṭutteṉ kaṭakaṉ kuñciramallanākiya coḻamārāyanukku Ādidāsa caṇḍe
śvaraneṉ Emmuṭaiyārruḷppāṭṭāl viṟṟukkuṭutteṉ Ippaṭi
Digital edition of SII 22.298 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
